docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RICHARD KUNKEL & PHILIPPE BOIS IN SUPPORT OF RESPONSE TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY RESPONDENT KUNKEL, RICHARD BOIS, PHILIPE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ROBIN WEARY'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. IT WAS THE INTENT OF THE PARTIES TO ARBITRATE THIS AND RELATED DISPUTES. THE FACT THAT THE PROPERTY HAS BEEN SOLD DOES NOT CHANGE THAT FACT OR THE ENFORCEABILITY OF THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE WAIVER. (PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER WEARLEY, ROBIN

Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ROBIN WEARLEY'S Petition For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment Thereon.
APPEARANCES: Eric D. McFarland, Esq. of Law Offices Lippenberger, Thompson, Welch, Soroko & Gilbert LLP 927-5200 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PETITIONER ROBIN WEARY'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration IS GRANTED. IT WAS THE INTENT OF THE PARTIES TO ARBITRATE THIS AND RELATED DISPUTES. THE FACT THAT THE PROPERTY HAS BEEN SOLD DOES NOT CHANGE THAT FACT OR THE ENFORCEABILITY OF THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE WAIVER. (PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)
